ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_nbr" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the station is located */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_codes" (
  "code" TEXT /* Weather code identifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition represented by the code */,
  "code_category" TEXT /* Category of the weather code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "station_nbr" INTEGER /* ID of the station data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "station_nbr" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which analytics are calculated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature calculated */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed recorded */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_analytics_station_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("station_nbr") REFERENCES stations ("station_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecast record */,
  "station_nbr" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_temp_high" REAL /* Predicted high temperature */,
  "forecast_temp_low" REAL /* Predicted low temperature */,
  "forecast_conditions" TEXT /* Predicted weather conditions */,
  "forecast_model_used" TEXT /* Forecast model used */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("station_nbr") REFERENCES stations ("station_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and capabilities */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the climate model */,
  "model_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the integrity check */,
  "station_nbr" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the check is performed */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the integrity check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of check performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the check */,
  "check_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the integrity checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_checks_station_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("station_nbr") REFERENCES stations ("station_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the satellite image */,
  "station_nbr" INTEGER /* ID of the station for which the image is related */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date of the satellite image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the satellite image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_imagery_station_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("station_nbr") REFERENCES stations ("station_nbr")
)
